creator: antonfuller@bv.mintemail.com
text:
Shorty after starting on an IPv6-enabled system, both components of mDNSResponder crash. Both /usr/local/sbin/mdnsd and /usr/local/bin/mDNSResponderPosix crash and core dump.

Fix: 

The patch from:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-bugs/2013-September/053886.html
appears to resolve the issue.
How-To-Repeat: service start mDNSResponderPosix; service start mdnsd; observe logs to note core dumps and assertion errors. Offending file seems to be mDNSPosix/mDNSUNP.h
